description_long: This object is a wooden surfboard mounted vertically on a gray display stand. The surfboard features a natural wood grain finish with two parallel dark inlaid stripes running lengthwise down the center. At the top front, there is a prominent engraved logo reading 'Sidem' with a stylized '20' above it, and the word 'Anniversary' below. The base is a solid, rounded gray platform with blue and red circular accents and the text 'W & R' visible on the front. The surfboard is relatively thick, as seen from the side, and has a classic longboard shape with a rounded nose and tail. No fins, leash attachments, or deck pads are visible, and the back is plain wood with no additional markings.
description: A wooden surfboard with a natural finish, engraved logo, and mounted on a gray display stand with blue and red accents. The board has a classic longboard shape and visible wood grain.
description_view_0: Front view shows the engraved logo, wood grain, two dark stripes, and the gray stand with blue and red accents.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the surfboard's thickness and the vertical orientation on the stand, with minimal visible detail.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plain wood back with two dark stripes and the gray stand, no logo or artwork present.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again highlights the board's thickness and the stand, with no additional features visible.
attribute_brand_logo: Engraved logo on the upper front of the board, featuring a stylized '20', the word 'Sidem', and 'Anniversary' below, all in dark brown.
attribute_artwork_or_graphics: Engraved logo and text on the front; otherwise, the board is plain with visible wood grain and two dark inlaid stripes.
